final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for the launch announcement of 长安起源Q06 electric SUV, scheduled for September release.

Style/medium: modern automotive marketing poster, clean editorial layout, premium Chinese EV brand aesthetic
Composition: wide landscape format with centered title hierarchy, generous negative space for text overlay, rule-of-thirds placement for vehicle silhouette or abstract element
Subject: launch announcement for 长安起源Q06, September 2024 market debut
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient or atmospheric cityscape with depth, translucent layers suggesting motion and innovation, subtle Chinese architectural motifs or skyline hints
Lighting/mood: soft diffused light with subtle rim highlights, aspirational and forward-looking mood, premium quality feel
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal base with electric blue accents, silver or white for typography, maintaining 长安 brand color consistency
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: must accommodate both main title and subtitle placement; background should remain legible behind text; scalable for PPT 16:9 format
Avoid: cluttered composition, overly literal car photography, generic stock photo aesthetic, excessive gradients, watermark, 8K stuffer terms
